# Cassava Miller — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-cassava-miller-cassava-miller-site
**Vertical slug:** cassava-miller
**VN-ID:** VN-AGR-PRO-001
**Niche family:** NF-AGR-PRO anchor (grain processing family)
**Family role:** anchor
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria is the world's largest cassava producer (~60M tonnes/year). Cassava millers produce garri, cassava flour, starch, ethanol feedstock, and fufu. Maize millers produce corn flour (tuwo), grits, and animal feed. Rice millers process paddy into table rice. Milling businesses range from village-level garri-processing cooperatives to semi-industrial NAFDAC-registered plants. Benue, Kogi, Ogun, Cross River, Anambra, and Delta states are major cassava belts. Millers sell directly to households, distributors, restaurants, and export agents. AFEX commodity exchange and NIRSAL agro-processing support are government incentives restructuring formal milling.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Ngozi Okafor, 45, Distributor, Onitsha** — Buys 50kg garri bags weekly for resale. Needs bulk pricing, delivery to Anambra, WhatsApp order placement.
- **Emeka Eze, 38, Restaurant Owner, Enugu** — Sources fufu and garri for daily meals. Needs freshness guarantee, NAFDAC certification, consistent supply.
- **Halima Usman, 52, Farm Cooperative Chair, Benue** — Wants to use the miller for post-harvest processing. Needs toll-milling rates per bag, machine capacity schedule.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home:** Hero + "Fresh Garri From Farm to Table", product highlights, NAFDAC badge, WhatsApp order CTA
- **Products:** Garri (white, yellow), Cassava Flour, Fufu, Corn Flour, Rice — NGN prices per 25kg/50kg
- **Milling Services:** Toll-milling rates, capacity, turnaround time, collection/delivery options
- **About:** Location, farm-to-table story, years established, community impact
- **Contact:** WhatsApp, phone, address, NDPR notice

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Warm, proud, community-rooted. "From our farm to your table" register. Reference specific states/zones (Benue cassava belt, Anambra garri). Primary CTA: "Order on WhatsApp". Secondary CTA: "Get Toll-Milling Quote". Avoid corporate detachment — this is a family/cooperative business voice.

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- NAFDAC registration number (mandatory for packaged food)
- SON quality mark for packaged garri/flour
- FMARD agro-processing licence
- CAC business registration
- Cooperative society registration (where applicable)
- Customer testimonials (distributors, restaurants)
- Payment: bank transfer, POS, mobile money

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Garri processing machine in operation — open-air mill in Benue/Anambra setting
2. 50kg bags of white garri stacked neatly — NAFDAC label visible
3. Women sifting and packaging garri — cooperative setting, colourful attire
4. Freshly pressed cassava before milling — roots in wooden press
5. Delivery truck loaded with garri bags — village to city supply chain
6. Corn grits and maize flour in display bowls — market presentation
7. Miller owner inspecting product quality — professional, proud expression

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- NAFDAC food processing registration number displayed
- SON quality mark certification
- FMARD agro-processing licence
- NESREA environmental compliance (effluent, waste management)
- NDPR consent for trade/delivery contact data collection

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- [x] WhatsApp CTA on home page and contact page
- [x] All prices in NGN (₦) per 25kg/50kg bag
- [x] Nigerian states/cities (Benue, Onitsha, Enugu) as location context
- [x] Nigerian names in testimonials (Ngozi, Emeka, Halima)
- [x] NAFDAC trust signal displayed prominently
- [x] Payment: bank transfer, POS, mobile money only
- [x] Mobile-first 375px layout
- [x] esc() on all user-supplied strings
- [x] NDPR notice in order/contact forms
